rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Microsoft VBA For Outlook Addin Loaded Via Outlook

rules.rule_text:
title: Microsoft VBA For Outlook Addin Loaded Via Outlook
id: 9a0b8719-cd3c-4f0a-90de-765a4cb3f5ed
status: test
description: Detects outlvba (Microsoft VBA for Outlook Addin) DLL being loaded by
  the outlook process
references:
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-persistence-via-microsoft-exchange-server-or-outlook?slide=58
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-02-08
modified: 2024-03-12
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1204.002
logsource:
  category: image_load
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \outlook.exe
    ImageLoaded|endswith: \outlvba.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate macro usage. Add the appropriate filter according to your environment
level: medium
